title: pediomelum oliganthum
intro: Pediomelum oliganthum, also known as a small-flowered locoweed, is a flowering plant native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Pediomelum oliganthum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues due to its antimicrobial and expectorant properties. Pediomelum oliganthum can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
